summary: Verified the auto-detect bug fix for real-world finance CSV headers on the New Allocation wizard. All 5 REQUIRED column mappings now auto-fill correctly with user's exact headers (Bank: Date,Amount,Reference,Narrative / Invoice: Ref,Name:,Balance,Date). Visual indicators (green/red dots + counters) work as designed. Full end-to-end allocation completed successfully with 1 reference match.
critical_code_review_comments: detectHeaders() 3-pass normalized matcher in NewAllocation.jsx lines 53-92 works correctly. Normalization (lowercase + strip non-alphanumerics) handles 'Name:' colon, and expanded candidate lists cover 'Ref'/'Balance' which were the original failure points.
MappingGroup counter+dot UI (lines 353-396) renders correctly: 2/2 bank required mapped + 3/3 invoice required mapped, with 10 green dots and 0 red dots for the test inputs.

Note: 'Narrative' did NOT map to bank_payer because the 2nd pass requires header.contains(candidate) but 'narrative' (norm) is not contained in any of [payer, counterparty, remitter, sender, fromparty, originator, name, party, from]. This is acceptable per the request (bank_payer is optional). If desired, add 'narrative'/'narration'/'description' to bank_payer candidates as a future minor enhancement.
seed_data_creation: Created one test allocation 'TEST Auto-detect Real Headers' (period 2026-01) via wizard with the user's exact headers; resulted in 1 fully-matched row (INV-1001 £1,200.00). ID: 49f589a3-4f7f-4aba-8197-986095a9f70a
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login route is /signin (not /login). Testids: signin-email, signin-password, signin-submit. New allocation page /new with testids: run-name-input, run-period-input, wizard-next, wizard-back, bank-csv-textarea, invoice-csv-textarea (both hidden inside <details><summary>Or paste raw CSV text</summary> — must click summary first), bank-csv-sample, invoice-csv-sample, map-{field} for all mapping selects, validate-button, validation-report. Sample CSV buttons load DIFFERENT headers than user's real ones (Date,Reference,Payer,Amount) — use textarea paste for testing real header detection.

verification_details.optional_map-bank_payer: empty (acceptable per request — Narrative not in payer candidates)
verification_details.validation_report_clean: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 100% coverage on all mapped columns
verification_details.end_to_end_allocation: SUCCESS — toast 'Allocation complete' + redirected to /allocations/{id}, 1 fully matched row by reference INV-1001 (£1,200.00, high confidence)
